title: rubus joratensis
intro: Rubus joratensis, also known as Jorat raspberry or Jorat bramble, is a rare species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to Europe. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rubus joratensis include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus joratensis are typically made by infusing the leaves and roots in hot water to create teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
